global_description: Medium-sized insect with a flat, oval body, predominantly brown or black, with a glossy, hard exoskeleton. It has long, thin antennae, six spiny legs, and wings that lay flat on the back, often partially covering the abdomen.

part_details.head: Small with long, thin antennae
part_details.legs: Six spiny legs attached to thorax
part_details.wings: Flat on back, partially covering abdomen
part_details.antennae: Long and thin, extending from head

spatial_relations: Head at front, abdomen at rear
